title: A human induced 3i
wikitext:
[]: A human-induced 3i?             Quote Post by Duke » Tue Mar 10, 2009 12:29 am If an angel were to go back to Adam, third impact would occur. Would Third Impact also occur if a human were to walk into Lilith?

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Tue Mar 10, 2009 12:35 am Wasn't what happened in EoE considered "Human-induced"?

[]:             Quote Post by Duke » Tue Mar 10, 2009 12:37 am I meant morely any human, not Rei & Adam together.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Mar 10, 2009 12:43 am It's gotta be more than mere physical contact, or else these Gehirn people would be taking seriously bigger precautions than they are: They're down in the pit that contains the presumably still-connected Eva-01 and Lilith. If just brushing up against Lilith brings on the end of the world, you aren't going to remove the helmet of your protective gear while you're on site. And Yui and her buddy with the glasses there couldn't afford to show any skin at all, either.

[]:             Quote Post by Duke » Tue Mar 10, 2009 12:50 am Hmm... Maybe they have to be willing for it to happen? Like they have to make contact with Lilith with the intention of starting 3i with her?

[]: Re: A human-induced 3i?             Quote Post by slothen » Tue Mar 10, 2009 10:40 am Duke wrote: Would Third Impact also occur if a human were to walk into Lilith?

[]: Re: A human-induced 3i?             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Mar 10, 2009 11:28 am slothen wrote: Also, are dem some wings on that plugsuit?

[]:             Quote Post by Legendary » Tue Mar 10, 2009 12:44 pm Really, I think that the Angel into Adam business is that an Angel making contact with Adam would wake Adam up in a stable fashion (2I but longer). Since Lilith is already awake and pretty stable, a human making contact doesn't do anything. Lilith's pretty good, even if she's soulless and ripped in two. Lilith doesn't need to wipe out the dominant race, the dominant race is what she was meant to create. Now, if the roles were reversed, and Adam and Angels were dominant, then yes, a human making contact with Lilith would wake her up and cause 3I, for the ANGELS.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Tue Mar 10, 2009 12:58 pm Also Lilim don't have the whole goopy fleshy merging power that everything else has.

[]:             Quote Post by Oedipusfoot » Wed Mar 11, 2009 2:23 pm Reichu wrote: They're down in the pit that contains the presumably still-connected Eva-01 and Lilith.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Mar 11, 2009 2:40 pm Oedipusfoot wrote: Was Unit-01 naturally growing from Lilith or was it induced by humans...?

[]:             Quote Post by xfactor30seconds » Fri Mar 20, 2009 4:20 pm Duke wrote: Hmm... Maybe they have to be willing for it to happen? Like they have to make contact with Lilith with the intention of starting 3i with her?

[]:             Quote Post by Legendary » Fri Mar 20, 2009 4:32 pm That's not the same thing. The god-like being had already been formed, it was just asking someone if 3I was wanted because of previous human experience. Again, a human contact with Lilith wouldn't accomplish much.
summary:
[]: A human-induced 3i?             Quote Post by Duke » Tue Mar 10, 2009 12:29 am If an angel were to go back to Adam, third impact would occur. Would Third Impact also occur if a human were to walk into Lilith?

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Tue Mar 10, 2009 12:35 am Wasn't what happened in EoE considered "Human-induced"?

[]:       &nbs
